creator: l.tatva@gmail.com
text:
Confirm. Slightly newer 7520g same problem with 7.0 and 7.1 beta.

Dumps:

7.0 (i386):

int=00000006 err=00000000 efl=00010006 eip=00458a34

Eax=00458a30 ebx=00458a30 ecx=a0000075 edx=00048890

Esi=0006632c edi=0005c05c ebp=00092c84 esp=0009cc44

Cs:0008 ds=0010 es=0010 fs=0010 gs=0010 ss=0010

Cs:eip=0f c7 80 d4 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b8 01 00 00 00

           Sd c3 8d 76 00 8d bc 27  00 00 00 00 55 89 e5 5d

Ss:esp=90 95 00 00 00 00 00 80  75 00 00 a0 00 00 00 00

            00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  90 88 09 00 00 00 14 01

BTX halted



7.0 (amd64):

The problem occurs right before the boot menu but I cannot submit the dump

Because it scrolls too fast (all I can make out is "BTX halted")



7.1beta (i386&AMD64):

Int=0000000d err=0000447c efl=00010002 eip=0045c522

Eax=0045c520 ebx=0045c520 ecx=a0000075 edx=000498a0

Esi=00067dec edi=0005d05c ebp=00092c84 esp=000093fa

Cs=0008 ds=0010 es=0010 fs=0010 gs=0010 ss=0010

Cs:eip=9a 98 54 00 80 7f 44 08  75 4c 83 7d e8 11 75 26

           8b 57 08 83 7f 0c 00 75  0c 83 c2 30 ed 0d 00 00

Ss:esp= 36 80 0d 07 90 00 00 01  e9 cb fc ff ff aa ac 84

              C0 0f 84 86 00 00 00 a8  80 74 f2 88 c5 b0 3d aa

BTX halted



Also there seems to be an ACPI issue with this laptop because the dump is
preceded by:

"

ACPI autoload failed  no such file or directory

|

"

Except of course the no acpi option.
